title: Parallel Processing & Advanced I/O
description: Implement parallel processing capabilities and advanced I/O optimizations: streaming exports, worker pool for fuzzy search, async centrality with chunked processing

sprints.title: Streaming Export Foundation
sprints.focus: Create StreamingExporter utility for memory-efficient exports

sprints.title: Integrate Streaming into IOManager
sprints.focus: Enable streaming for all export operations through IOManager

sprints.title: Worker Pool for Fuzzy Search
sprints.focus: Parallel Levenshtein distance calculations with worker threads

sprints.title: Async Centrality & Chunked Processing
sprints.focus: Non-blocking graph analytics with progress callbacks

dependencyGraph.mermaid:
graph TD
    S1[Sprint 1: Streaming Foundation] --> S2[Sprint 2: IOManager Integration]
    S1 --> S3[Sprint 3: Worker Pool]
    S2 --> S4[Sprint 4: Async Centrality]
    S3 --> S4

parallelExecutionGroups.description: Can run in parallel after Sprint 1

riskAssessment.mitigation: Only use for large graphs/low thresholds

sonnet.description: All tasks have detailed Haiku instructions

haiku.description: All tasks with step-by-step implementation guides

technicalNotes: Streaming exports use Node.js WriteStream for constant memory
Worker threads require worker_threads module from Node.js
Workers are spawned per-task and terminated after completion
Chunked processing yields control via setImmediate()
Approximation uses random sampling with scaled results
notes: Phase 7 focuses on scalability improvements. Streaming exports enable handling graphs larger than available RAM. Worker pool parallelizes CPU-bound fuzzy matching. Chunked centrality prevents UI freezing during analytics. All improvements are backward compatible.
